title: Market Brief — Monday, May 18, 2026
summary: Compute is scarce across every GPU class. H100 availability sits at a severe 10% (35/189 GPUs), B200 at 14% (88/177), A100 at 20% (144/342), and H200 at 21% (74/212) — none clearing the 25% threshold. H100 spot surged 42.9% day-over-day to $2.86/hr, the sharpest single-day move in the stack, while H100 utilization hit 90.3%, up 10.5pp in 30 days — demand is outrunning supply hard.
paragraphs: Compute is scarce across every GPU class. H100 availability sits at a severe 10% (35/189 GPUs), B200 at 14% (88/177), A100 at 20% (144/342), and H200 at 21% (74/212) — none clearing the 25% threshold. H100 spot surged 42.9% day-over-day to $2.86/hr, the sharpest single-day move in the stack, while H100 utilization hit 90.3%, up 10.5pp in 30 days — demand is outrunning supply hard.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), Llama 70B inference runs $10.45/M on H100 and $9.28/M on H200 — meaning any provider pricing medium-tier output at $3/M is selling at a loss of roughly $7/M tokens on H100. DeepSeek (V3.2 at $0.45/M output) and Meta Llama 4 Maverick ($0.60/M) are burning cash at scale. OpenAI's o3 Pro at $80/M output and Anthropic's Opus 4.6 at $25/M are the only models with comfortable margins. Grades: OpenAI Strong, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash.

H100 is overvalued at $2.86 spot given 121.7% annualized vol on the competing H200 OCPI and only marginal throughput advantage — rotate exposure to B200 at $5.00/hr where TCO-adjusted inference ($4.58/M on A100-equivalent) yields 39%+ margin at high tier. Undervalued play: A100 at $0.91/hr with 20% availability offers the best margin profile at $4.58/M base cost, especially for open-source models priced near $0.30/M output where volume compensates.
bullets: 10% of H100 GPUs are available, the tightest supply in the entire stack.
144 of 342 A100 GPUs are free, making it the most available class at 20%.
$2.86 median H100 spot is up 42.9% in a single day.
$0.06 per million output tokens is the floor, set by Meta Llama 3.1 8B and Gemma 2b.
90.3% H100 utilization marks a 10.5 percentage point jump in 30 days.
21.76 LLMflation index means GPT-4 equivalent output now costs 78% less than at launch.
